ocr_findings.description: Lesson 06-07 header graphic with concentric-circle diagram (要件定義/設計/プログラミング/テスト cycle) replaced by image placeholder img-0.jpeg. Diagram is decorative and not load-bearing.

reviewer_notes: Page 238 introduces ソフトウェアの開発モデル and covers ウォーターフォールモデル. All body text captured faithfully including key terms in bold. The page has substantial body content so content (not chapter_title) label is correct.
